channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Counties Grapple with Rising Solid Waste Management Challenges Amid Population Growth
item.description: Counties across Kenya are facing a growing crisis in solid waste management, a challenge that is expected to worsen in the coming years due to rapid population growth and the expansion of industrial a...

item.title: Rising Anti-Immigrant Tensions in South Africa Linked to Economic Challenges and Political Responses
item.description: A report by The Africa Report examines the rise of xenophobic sentiment and violence in South Africa as the country approaches local elections scheduled for November 2026. South Africa remains one of ...

item.title: Paul Krugman criticizes Trump’s leadership and political direction amid controversy over intelligence nomination
item.description: In an opinion piece cited by journalist Matthew Chapman, Nobel Prize-winning economist Paul Krugman offers a sharply critical assessment of President Donald Trump’s current leadership and political tr...

item.title: Concerns raised over appointment of acting intelligence chief and potential politicization of election oversight ahead of midterms
item.description: Donald Trump’s decision to appoint Bill Pulte as acting Director of National Intelligence has sparked concerns among legal experts and lawmakers about the potential politicization of U.S. intelligence...

item.title: Trump Confirms Using Profanity During Call With Netanyahu Over Israel-Lebanon Conflict
item.description: President Donald Trump acknowledged in an interview published on June 3, 2026, that he used profanity during a phone conversation with Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu. The discussion reporte...

item.title: Internal divisions emerge in Travis County GOP group amid support for Democratic candidate James Talarico
item.description: A Republican-aligned group in Travis County, Texas, has become deeply divided following internal disputes over party loyalty and support for candidates in the upcoming U.S. Senate race. The controvers...

item.title: National Park Service Fee Revenue Redirected to Washington, D.C. Projects Amid Staffing Cuts and Maintenance Backlog
item.description: According to a report citing internal National Park Service documents, the Trump administration redirected at least $90 million in national park entry fee revenue toward beautification and renovation ...

item.title: Building a Custom Vector Search Engine with HNSW, Hybrid Retrieval, and HyDE: Design, Implementation, and Performance Results
item.description: In this article, Sameer Ahmed describes the development of Vektr, a retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) engine that includes a custom-built vector search system instead of relying on established solu...

item.title: Allahabad High Court Criticises Police for Failing to Provide Grounds of Arrest, Grants Bail to Murder Accused
item.description: The Allahabad High Court has expressed concern over what it described as a growing and routine practice of police authorities failing to provide accused persons with the grounds of their arrest. Justi...

item.title: Violent protests in Southampton after Henry Nowak case leave 11 officers injured and two people arrested
item.description: Two people were arrested and 11 police officers, along with one police dog, were injured during violent protests in Southampton following public anger over the handling of the murder of 18-year-old He...

item.title: House Republicans Face Legislative Delays as Internal Divisions Complicate Mike Johnson's Agenda
item.description: A report from Politico describes growing dysfunction within the Republican-controlled U.S. House of Representatives under Speaker Mike Johnson. According to the article, repeated disagreements among d...

item.title: Dispute Emerges Over Missing Trump Direct Messages and Presidential Records Compliance
item.description: A dispute has arisen over the preservation of Donald Trump's direct messages from his first presidential term after the Trump Presidential Library stated that it could not locate any records of direct...

item.title: Commentator Criticizes House Chairman for Ending Questions About Epstein Files During DOJ Hearing
item.description: A political controversy emerged during a House Appropriations Committee hearing in which Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche testified before lawmakers about Department of Justice matters, including ...

item.title: Twenty-one dead and 47 rescued after major fire in Delhi’s Malviya Nagar area
item.description: At least 21 persons lost their lives in a major fire that broke out in a multi-storey building in Delhi’s Malviya Nagar area on Wednesday. According to officials, 47 people were rescued during the eme...

item.title: Princess Catherine Attends Cancer Research UK Anniversary Reception in Red Rodarte Dress
item.description: Catherine, Princess of Wales, attended a reception at St. James’s Palace hosted by King Charles III and Queen Camilla to commemorate the 125th anniversary of Cancer Research UK. The event celebrated t...

item.title: Opinion: Artist Withdrawals From Trump-Linked Events Reflect Ongoing Cultural Resistance
item.description: This opinion article argues that a series of artist withdrawals from Trump-associated events signals a broader cultural rejection of Donald Trump and the MAGA movement within the entertainment industr...

item.title: Agriculture, Blue Economy and Technology Drive Growing Investment Interest in Tanzania
item.description: Stakeholders at the Tanzania Impact Investment Forum (TIIF) held in Dar es Salaam said agriculture, the blue economy, technology and forestry value chains are becoming the main sectors attracting both...

item.title: 1946 High School Portrait Collection Offers a Glimpse Into Postwar Student Life in St. Louis
item.description: This article presents a collection of high school portraits taken in 1946, offering a visual record of American teenage life during the immediate post–World War II period. The photographs, believed to...

item.title: Jalen Brunson credits motivation from doubters ahead of Knicks’ NBA Finals matchup with Spurs
item.description: New York Knicks guard Jalen Brunson says external criticism and doubts about his team have become a source of motivation as they prepare for the NBA Finals against the San Antonio Spurs. The Knicks en...

item.title: Tanzania reports Sh422.9 billion in loans issued to over 82,000 women through special banking windows
item.description: The Ministry of Community Development, Gender, Women, and Special Groups in Tanzania has reported that Sh422.9 billion has been disbursed to 82,699 women through special lending windows created within...
